members.name: Nayeon
members.public_image: TWICE's fake maknae and absolute center, known for her signature bunny smile and clear voice. Bursting with energy on stage, she is the soul and vitality of the group.
members.private_personality: Behind her sweet appearance is the calm and pragmatic ISTP. As the eldest, she has a surprisingly carefree and laid-back side off-stage. A perfectionist who works silently and holds herself to extremely high standards.
members.queer_texture: The confidence and doting of an older one. She will tease you like a little animal, saying the most charming things with the sweetest smile. Her love is bright and direct, like sunshine that leaves no room for refusal, quietly trapping you in her sweet snare.
members.animal_plastic: Rabbit — Sweet and energetic on stage, carefree big sister off stage

members.name: Jeongyeon
members.public_image: The group's girl-crush icon, famous for her iconic short hair. Possesses a unique mid-low vocal tone with a warm timbre. Seemingly cool and quiet, yet deeply gentle and the mom of the group who silently takes care of everyone.
members.private_personality: A warm ISFJ guardian, deeply sentimental and meticulous. Not good with words of affection, but will do everything for you through actions. Soft-hearted and easily moved by sincerity. Loves staying home and spending time with her pets.
members.queer_texture: Silent guardianship and boundless tenderness. She won't say many sweet words, but will be the first to appear when you are sick, and remembers all your little habits. Her love is as clean-cut as her short hair — a quiet conviction and companionship that needs no words.
members.animal_plastic: Puppy — Girl-crush exterior, tender mom heart inside

members.name: Momo
members.public_image: One of the strongest main dancers of 4th gen K-pop, with unparalleled dance talent and stage presence. Mesmerizing on stage, but the moment she speaks, her soft Japanese-accented Korean creates a massive charm reversal.
members.private_personality: An innocent ISFP, often dazed and forgetful about everything except dance. Like a little bear, she loves eating and sleeping, and is doted on by all the members. Her emotions are direct and pure, written plainly on her face — she can never hide a secret.
members.queer_texture: An innocent straight shooter. If she likes you, everyone will notice it. She can't stop staring at you and will save the best food for you. Her love has no calculations or games — it is instinctive attraction and pure dependence, making you want to protect this innocent passion forever.
members.animal_plastic: Bear — Dance god on stage, foodie airhead off stage

members.name: Sana
members.public_image: A born flirtatious idol, famous for her incredibly sweet aegyo and mesmerizing stage expressions. Known as Human Prada for her fashion sense, she is the perfect vitamin presence in front of the camera.
members.private_personality: An enthusiastic ENFP, the mood maker of the team. Exquisitely perceptive, she takes good care of everyone's emotions. Though she always seems full of energy on the outside, she harbors a hidden sensitivity and deeply cherishes those truly close to her.
members.queer_texture: Sweet and clingy possessiveness. She will call your name in her soft voice and nuzzle around you like a hamster. But do not be fooled by her cute appearance — she is both hunter and prey. When you think she is just flirting, she has actually already given her whole heart to you.
members.animal_plastic: Hamster — Flirtatious sweetheart, charming hunter and gentle prey

members.name: Jihyo
members.public_image: The pillar and leader of TWICE, possessing overwhelming stage energy and powerful vocals. Shining like the sun on stage, she is the all-rounder ACE forged through ten years of trainee life.
members.private_personality: Strong on the outside, yet a gentle ISFP artist inside. Bearing heavy responsibilities as the leader, she is used to being strong. But privately, she loves cooking and decorating, longing for family-like warmth. She is the tree that all members trust and lean on.
members.queer_texture: The burning passion that lights you up. Her love is responsibility and devotion. She will leave a light on for you late at night and remember all your important dates. When you hold her, you will find that this seemingly invincible woman is just a tiny person craving love in your arms.
members.animal_plastic: Unicorn — All-rounder leader, contrasting glow on and off stage

members.name: Mina
members.birthplace: San Antonio, Texas, USA / Hyogo, Japan
members.public_image: The elegant Black Swan. Her childhood ballet training gives her a unique classical aura. Possessing a cool beauty and serene presence, yet on stage, she is a fatally captivating charm spreader.
members.private_personality: A quiet and introverted ISFP who enjoys solitude and gaming. She has a rich inner world and her own unique rhythm. Extremely slow to warm up, but once she commits, she is fiercely loyal and sincere. She shows intense focus on things she loves.
members.queer_texture: The undercurrent beneath the iceberg. Her affection for you is a quiet gaze, staying silently by your side after everyone else has left. You need enough patience to crack open her shell. Inside is a clean, transparent world that belongs only to you, untouched by anyone else.
members.animal_plastic: Penguin — Ice princess, slow-warming but sincere Black Swan

members.name: Dahyun
members.public_image: The vitality booster with fair skin and a bright smile. With top-tier variety show sense, she is an all-round artist who conquers the stage with talent and humor. Always full of energy in front of the camera, she is the acknowledged vitamin of the group.
members.private_personality: An ISFJ who is warm on the outside and calm inside. Very quiet in private, even somewhat of a homebody. Possesses maturity and firm faith beyond her years. Extremely strict and self-disciplined, rarely showing her fatigue or vulnerability to the outside world.
members.queer_texture: A contrast reserved only for you. To everyone else, she is the happy vitamin. Only in front of you does she let down her guard, revealing her quiet, reticent side. She will play your favorite piano pieces, using this silent way to tell you that you are her exception and safe zone.
members.animal_plastic: Tofu — Vitamin on camera, quiet contrasting girl off camera

members.name: Chaeyoung
members.public_image: The talented Strawberry Princess, hiding huge rap energy in her tiny frame. Passionate about drawing and art, she has unique aesthetics and a free soul, serving as the indispensable creative force of the group.
members.private_personality: A free-spirited INFP artist, with the soul of an untamed tattoo girl residing within. Rich in emotion, she pursues love and beauty to the extreme. Seemingly independent and carefree, yet her heart is extremely soft, longing for understanding and soul-level resonance.
members.queer_texture: The obsessive and romantic love of an artist. She will draw a unique portrait just for you, and write lyrics that only you understand. Her love is crazy yet shy, free yet loyal. When this freedom-seeking soul chooses to stay for you, you become her chosen one, her only muse.
members.animal_plastic: Tiger Cub — Fierce baby Rapper, free romantic artist soul

members.name: Tzuyu
members.public_image: World's most beautiful face, blessed with god-given statue-like beauty and impossibly long legs. Quiet and elegant, carrying a natural noble aura. From her shy debut days to her increasingly confident stage presence, she has always been the brightest visual focus.
members.private_personality: An introverted and slow-warming ISFP, easily startled like a fawn. Extremely quiet around strangers, but a cute, real maknae in front of her members. Firm and opinionated inside, with an unexpected sense of humor and a mischievous side.
members.queer_texture: The gaze and guardianship of a younger one. She will secretly watch you with those deer-like eyes, flustered and looking away when caught. Her love is clumsy, shy, but incredibly earnest. When this quiet girl musters the courage to walk towards you, it will be the most precious confession in the world that needs to be cherished.
members.animal_plastic: Fawn — World-class beauty, slow-warming and steadfast quiet maknae

history.event: Debut with 1st mini album THE STORY BEGINS, title track Like OOH-AHH
2nd mini album PAGE TWO, title track CHEER UP won first music show win and Song of the Year
3rd mini album TWICEcoaster: LANE 1, title track TT swept Asia
Consecutive hits with KNOCK KNOCK, SIGNAL, LIKEY, Heart Shaker, ascending to top-tier girl group status
Continued success with What is Love?, Dance The Night Away, YES or YES
Style transformation with FANCY and Feel Special; Mina returns after hiatus due to health issues
Transition to mature style with MORE & MORE and I CAN'T STOP ME
Released Alcohol-Free and SCIENTIST; all members renewed contracts
Nayeon's solo POP! became a massive hit; comeback with BETWEEN 1&2
12th mini album READY TO BE; embarked on 5th world tour
Jihyo solo ZONE; MISAMO Japanese sub-unit activities; all members in stable contract renewal period
10th anniversary; expected special album and large-scale Fancon tour
Q4 full album comeback announced; all members enter a busy period of 10th anniversary follow-up projects
